title: Festive Floral Crunchy Oat Milk Pudding
description: A festive and flavorful Syrian dish featuring a blend of oat milk, almond cure, and crunchy toppings that make it perfect for breakfast or as a dessert.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons almond cure or any other suitable flavoring agent like matcha powder
1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, finely chopped

instructions: Mix the oat milk and almond cure in a blender until smooth.
Fold in the coconut flakes, chopped mint leaves, and crushed pistachios into the blended mixture until well combined.
Pour the mixture into molds or small ramekins and refrigerate for at least an hour before serving.
Garnish each serving with shredded coconut for added texture and flavor.
